description: You are the National EPI Manager for Sierra Leone. Prepare a visualization for the quarterly review meeting showing immunization performance context using DHIS2 (http://localhost:8080, login: admin / district). Create a map named 'Penta3 Coverage and Facilities Sierra Leone 2023' featuring a thematic layer for 'Penta 3' coverage or doses by District for the year 2023, along with a contextual layer (either facility locations or a comparative indicator such as Measles). Export the resulting map as an image to /home/ga/Downloads/.
